rows.label: qev086602_MSG0001
rows.name: Team Tatsu mission complete![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0002
rows.name:
Yeah, it looks like we've
got everything in the area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0003
rows.name:
I sure hope they can get something
useful out of all this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0004
rows.name: Well, well... Beaten to the punch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0005
rows.name: Hey, Doug![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0006
rows.name: Gotta hand it to you, Elma—you work fast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0007
rows.name:
You must be the other team
Vandham sent out, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0008
rows.name: One of 'em, anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0009
rows.name:
Thought we made pretty good time, too, but
then you always were one step ahead...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0010
rows.name: Remember?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0011
rows.name:
Back when Earth was hit— that lone Doll
that struck back before anyone else?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0011_2
rows.name: Guess whose Doll that was.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0012
rows.name: Wait, really?! Elma, that was you?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0013
rows.name:
That was a long time ago...and
it didn't change anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0014
rows.name:
Come to think of it, that was a tandem
Doll, wasn't it? Weren't you with, er—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0015
rows.name:
It's a distress call...
Signal originating from—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0016
rows.name: That's Iriina's ID![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0017
rows.name: And not far from here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0018
rows.name: We'll go ahead—we can link back up later![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086602_MSG0019
rows.name: Team Tatsu coming too![ST:wait ]
